arts.ttl: 'I am NOT a clown' - Ange Postecoglou rages at journalist as Tottenham boss hits back at claims his future is in doubt ahead of Europa League final showdown with Man United
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou turned his ire on a reporter during a tetchy press conference ahead of Tottenham's Europa League final against Man United. The sides face to face in Bilbao on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's team news for Spurs v Man Utd| Europa League final
arts.sum: "Maybe, in the final minutes, if we have two subs, then one and can wait for extra-time to have a think about the possibility. Sometimes, they are really, really important to win a final.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson names the team he just can't see winning the Europa League final out of Man United and Tottenham
Patrice Evra opens up on the heartbreaking reason why Man United legend will MISS Europa League final against Tottenham
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim 's side will be looking to resurrect a stuttered season at San Mames after an impressive European campaign has kept them in touch for silverware.

arts.ttl: Man United and Tottenham disabled fans fume at 'insulting' treatment for Europa League Final after being given just 26 wheelchair spaces each in 50,000 seater stadium - falling well below UEFA's own guidelines
arts.sum: UEFA recommends that a stadium of San Mames's capacity, which is being reduced to 49,600 for the final, should have 236 wheelchair spaces and 236 'amenity and easy access seats'.

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm squad for Europa League final vs Spurs after surprise triple injury boost
arts.sum: Manchester United have included Leny Yoro and Joshua Zirkzee in their squad for the Europa League final despite both men being injury concerns ahead of the clash with Tottenham

arts.ttl: Spurs vs Man Utd preview: Who will claim Europa League glory?
arts.sum: Sky Sports Football features writer Nick Wright and Sky Sports News reporters Dharmesh Sheth and Danyal Khan are in Bilbao and they will answer your questions on the final on Wednesday. To view this content you can use the button below to allow Monterosa cookies for this session only.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Tottenham Target Confirms Free Transfer Plan
arts.sum: Angel Gomes has confirmed his decision to leave Lille as a free agent once his contract expires this summer amid competing transfer interest.

arts.ttl: All or nothing: Spurs and Man Utd face defining moment
arts.sum: As Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United prepare to meet in Wednesday’s UEFA Europa League final, football writer Ben Bloom looks at just how important the match is for each club. Spurs and Man Utd's UEFA Europa League showdown is unlike any of the five previous all-English European finals.

arts.ttl: Felix Zwayer Stats: Why Europa League final appointment benefits Man United over Tottenham
arts.sum: Two of the worst teams in the Premier League will battle for the Europa League next week as Tottenham face Manchester United in Bilbao. Spurs overcame Bodoe/Glimt to make their first European final si...
